headline: Without wildfire reform, California utilities could see credit impacts: Edison International
summary: CEO Pedro Pizarro called for a return to the cost-of-service model for California's regulated utilities during a company earnings call.

headline: Barclays Trims Edison International (EIX) Price Target Following Q1 Report
summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is included among the 10 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is one of the largest electric utility holding companies in America, focused on providing clean and reliable energy and energy services through its independent companies. On April 29, Barclays slightly lowered its price target […]
